title: Lemonade route policy (collection.router)
description: The routing block embedded in a collection.router collection JSON. Distributed and invoked exactly like collection.omni: point the OpenAI `model` field at the collection name and recipe:collection.router flips the server into engine mode. Generic engine; trust is a consumer. Vocabulary mirrors vLLM Semantic Router for migration.

version.description: Schema major version this document targets. This file defines version "1"; a server validates a policy against the schema matching its major version and rejects unknown majors with a clear message rather than a per-key error. Required so parsers never have to guess.

components.description: Lean local form: names of already-registered models (candidates AND classifier models). The full models[] manifest is only needed for Hugging Face redistribution.

models.description: Embedded component definitions for HF redistribution only; omitted when authoring locally.

candidates.description: Explicit routing-target set (analog of vLLM SR providers.models). default_model and every rule.route_to must be a member.

default_model.description: Fail-open target; must be a member of candidates.

router_sugar.description: Zero-config L0(a) LLM-as-router. Desugars at load into one `llm` classifier (labels = candidates) + identity rules (label X -> route_to X). This desugaring is pure, deterministic engine logic and is frozen for v1: its expansion must stay behavior-equivalent so existing L0(a) policies keep routing identically across server versions.

type.description: v1: semantic_similarity, classifier, llm. Reserved vLLM-SR presets ship post-v1 as thin presets over `classifier`.

labels.description: classifier output labels; dangling condition `label` refs are rejected.

reference_phrases.description: semantic_similarity only: a map of concept label -> exemplar phrases. Each concept's phrases are embedded once and compared to the input by cosine; the classifier reports the max cosine per concept as that concept's label score. The concept labels are this classifier's output labels (so a condition references a concept via `label`).

on_error.description: Behavior when the classifier fails to evaluate. match_true = fail-closed authoring. Frozen v1 default when omitted: match_false (fail-open).

id.description: Safe rule token surfaced in the x-lemonade-route header when matched.

route_to.description: Must name a candidate. The local/private/cloud route category is derived from the chosen component's recipe.

outputs.description: Engine-opaque pass-through bag, copied verbatim into the Decision (trust puts verdict here).

match_expr.description: Nested any/all/not over leaf conditions; first-match-wins across rules. vLLM SR's flat single-operator form is the subset.

min_score.description: Frozen v1 semantics: inclusive lower bound (score >= min_score). When neither min_score nor max_score is given, the band defaults to min_score: 0.5.

max_score.description: Frozen v1 semantics: inclusive upper bound (score <= max_score).

keywords_any.description: True if ANY keyword is present. Frozen v1 match: case-insensitive substring (ASCII case fold) over the input text. Token/BM25 matching is a future, separately named op, never a redefinition of this one.

keywords_all.description: True if ALL keywords are present. Frozen v1 match: case-insensitive substring (ASCII case fold) over the input text.

regex.description: True if the pattern matches the input. Frozen v1 dialect: ECMAScript (std::regex), case-sensitive. A different regex engine ships as a separately named op, never a redefinition of this one. Must be non-empty (an empty pattern matches everything; express an always-match rule by omitting the condition). Patterns with a nested unbounded quantifier (such as (X+)+) — the most common catastrophic-backtracking shape — are rejected at policy load as a safeguard on untrusted input; this mitigates but does not eliminate all backtracking risk, and a 1 MiB input cap bounds the worst case at evaluation time.

min_chars.description: Inclusive lower bound on input length. Frozen v1 unit: UTF-8 bytes (not Unicode code points). Token-based length is a future min_tokens, never a redefinition of this one.

max_chars.description: Inclusive upper bound on input length. Frozen v1 unit: UTF-8 bytes (not Unicode code points).

metadata_match.description: Deterministic leaf matching a caller-supplied OpenAI `metadata` key (e.g. task_class, consent), read verbatim from the request metadata map. Frozen v1 semantics: values are compared case-sensitively; a value is decoded into a token set by splitting on comma and trimming, so scalar and list-valued metadata match uniformly. A missing, empty, or whitespace-only value counts as absent (matches only `exists: false`). Exactly one comparator (equals / any / exists) must be present. A future comparator (regex, all, ...) ships as a new key, never a redefinition of these.

key.description: The metadata key to read. A missing, empty, or whitespace-only value matches only `exists: false`.

equals.description: True if the raw metadata value equals this string exactly (case-sensitive).

any.description: True if the value's comma-decoded token set intersects this list (handles both scalar and comma-encoded list-valued metadata).

exists.description: exists:true matches when the key is present and non-empty; exists:false matches when it is absent or empty.
